zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，关注关键支撑表现
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持窄幅震荡，最新价格运行于2063美元附近，24小时涨幅有限，显示市场多空力量暂时均衡。价格低于20日均线2071一线，说明短期趋势仍偏弱，反弹动能尚未完全恢复。

从技术指标观察，MACD处于零轴下方且维持负值，意味着空头动能依然占优，短线仍存在回调压力。RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格结构来看，市场尚未形成明显超买或超卖状态，整体偏谨慎整理格局。

关键支撑位可关注2055美元附近，一旦失守，可能进一步下探2040区域；上方阻力则位于2072至2085区间，若有效突破20日均线并放量站稳，才有机会打开进一步反弹空间。

交易策略方面，短线更适合区间思路操作，激进投资者可在2055附近轻仓尝试低吸，并严格设置止损。若价格突破2075并伴随成交量放大，可考虑顺势跟进，多头目标关注2100美元附近。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is showing signs of short-term consolidation around the $2060–$2065 range. The market has held relatively steady with only a minor 24-hour increase of 0.28%, suggesting neither buyers nor sellers are in full control. Price action has remained below the 20-period SMA at $2071.76, hinting at mild bearish pressure, while the intraday high and low ($2066.79 / $2056.77) reflect a narrow trading band, indicative of indecision and potential for a breakout once momentum shifts.

The MACD value of -7.528 indicates the short-term trend is slightly bearish, though the absence of a signal line reading limits confirmation. Typically, a negative MACD below the signal points to ongoing downward pressure, but the small magnitude implies momentum is weak. Traders should be cautious, as low volatility could lead to sudden swings. Once the MACD begins to converge with the signal, it may provide a clearer buy or sell signal, especially if coupled with a break above the SMA.

Key support levels to watch lie around $2050–$2055, reflecting the intraday low and recent consolidation zone. On the upside, resistance is near $2070–$2075, aligning with the 20-period SMA and short-term peaks. A sustained move above this resistance could open the door for further upside toward $2100, whereas a breakdown below support may trigger short-term selling pressure. Monitoring volume alongside these levels will be critical for validating any breakout.

For trading strategy, cautious range-bound tactics are advised. Buyers may consider accumulation near support levels, ideally with confirmation of price stability, while sellers could target positions near SMA resistance. Intraday traders might exploit the tight range with scalping strategies, keeping stop-losses just beyond support or resistance zones. Overall, patience is key until a decisive breakout occurs, which will define the next directional move for ETH/USD.
